description.en: Systematic assessment of large non-pedunculated colorectal polyps for size, morphology (Paris classification), site, access, surface and vascular pattern (NICE/JNET), and features predicting submucosal invasion.

criteria.en: Identifies LNPCPs and applies Paris classification with prompting.
Independently records SMSA, Paris morphology, NICE/JNET pattern, and flags features of SMI. Decision-aligned with senior reviewer ≥90 % of the time.
Teaches lesion assessment; predicts histology pre-resection with high accuracy; recognises atypical lesions warranting alternative management.
